2026-04-17T07:08:43.6764767Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6765180Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6765508Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6765789Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6766037Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6766227Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6766528Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-17T07:08:43.6767131Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6767323Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6767489Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6767712Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T07:08:43.6767915Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
